caption:
💦 The rain hissed against my neon-drenched jacket, a symphony of slick chrome and electric blue. I checked my reflection in a holographic storefront—my outfit hugged every curve, a sleek leather corset and thigh-high boots that whispered promises of danger and desire.

Tonight, I was supposed to meet the Midnight Ghost. They say she's a hacker, a phantom in the net. But the net always has a pulse, and I felt mine racing faster than my heart. My leather harness shifted as I leaned against the damp glass, the tight material doing its best work of hiding the fire burning beneath.

The air smelled of ozone and cheap synth-scent. I adjusted the collar of my cyber-gauntlet, feeling the hum of the data chip embedded in my wrist. A shadow detached itself from the alleyway entrance. He was tall, broad, his eyes glowing with optical implants. A perfect target. Or a perfect trap.

He stepped forward, the neon light painting his face in shades of crimson. "You came," he growled.

"Only if the price was right," I purred, a smile playing on my lips. My thighs brushed against the cool metal of the railing as I leaned in closer. The scent of his tech-spray mixed with the damp night air.

He reached out, his gloved hand grazing my arm. Static electricity crackled, a tiny spark between us. I watched the shadows behind him, the drones swarming the perimeter like angry hornets. If we weren't careful, I'd be scrap metal. But if I played my cards right...

I shifted my weight, the tight leather straining slightly with the movement. He followed the flow, his gaze dropping lower, lingering on the curve of my hip before rising back to my eyes.

"Run," I whispered, turning my back to the drone fire. "Follow the heat."

I bolted, the wind whipping my hair across my face. Behind me, his boots pounded the wet asphalt. I laughed, the sound swallowed by the hum of the city. This was my element. Dangerous. Electric. Alive.

I could feel the heat rising in my core, not just from the chase.

#CyberpunkChic #NeonRomance #SciFiErotica #CyberpunkGirl #DigitalDesire #NightLife #TechWear
